message:
fix(fr-command): ZRANGEBYLEX/ZLEXCOUNT/ZRANGESTORE-BYLEX reject unprefixed bounds [bd-frankenredis-moer]

Upstream Redis 7.2 t_zset.c::zslParseLexRangeItem requires lex
bounds to start with '[' (inclusive), '(' (exclusive), or be
exactly '-' (min) or '+' (max). Plain strings like 'a' or 'c'
were silently accepted by fr-store::zrangebylex / zrevrangebylex /
zlexcount and treated as inclusive bounds.

Adds validate_lex_bound helper called from:
  - ZRANGEBYLEX
  - ZREVRANGEBYLEX
  - ZLEXCOUNT
  - ZRANGESTORE BYLEX
that emits 'ERR min or max not valid string range item' (matching
upstream byte-for-byte) when the bound lacks the [/( prefix and
isn't '-'/'+'.

Verified against vendored redis 7.2.4: 'ZRANGEBYLEX z a c' /
'ZLEXCOUNT z a c' / 'ZRANGESTORE z2 z 0 -1 BYLEX' all now return
the upstream error; the prefixed/'+'/'-' forms continue to work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
